title: Clay Pals Unicorn - Easy Sculpt Fun Fast Air Drying Non Toxic Quick Dry Ultra Light Creative Clay Art and Craft Modelling Set for Kids
features: Clay Pals are a fun, easy way for your child to unleash their inner creativity and produce their own cute models
Our air drying clay is at first soft and flexible for easy modelling but within 24 hours has fully hardened to create an adorable ornament
Get your kids interested in arts and crafts with clay modelling as a great alternative to electronic games
Our Clay is non-sticky and non-toxic, allowing for safe and mess free fun
With 24 Clay Pals to collect, the fun can go on and on
description: Product Description CLAY PALS CHARACTER MODELLING SET Release your Creativity It’s time to get creative with our light-weight air drying Clay Pals. The header card includes instructions on the inside to help you create the character- or just get creative! Fast Air Drying Clay Each Clay Pal includes a pot with 4 sections of soft squidgy polymer clay with enough colours to create each character. The clay cures to a lightweight but very hard finish with no need to bake the model. Create a Collection We've got a range of 24 cute characters to create keep and collect! Are you up to the challenge? Our Other Products Check out the Stands Out, Supplying Outstanding Gifts store to find more gifts for children and adults of all ages!
